Instruction_Details: 1. Open Tableau. 2. Click 'Text file' under Connect. 3. Select 'final_enriched_data.csv'. 4. Go to 'Sheet 1'.

1. Drag 'Total Revenue' (Sum) to Text. 2. Drag 'Order Value' (Average) to Text. 3. Drag 'Order ID' (Count Distinct) to Text. 4. Click the 'Text' shelf to format the font size (make Revenue large and bold).
1. Drag 'City' to Columns. 2. Drag 'Order ID' (Count) to Rows. 3. Drag 'Cuisine' to Color. 4. Ensure Bar chart is selected in Marks. 5. Set View to 'Entire View'.

Data_Fields_Used: Age Group, Rest. Segment, Order ID
Instruction_Details: 1. Drag 'Age Group' to Columns. 2. Drag 'Order ID' (Count) to Rows. 3. Drag 'Restaurant Segment' to Color. 4. Turn on Mark Labels (click 'T' on toolbar).

1. Change Marks drop-down to 'Pie'. 2. Drag 'Cuisine' to Color. 3. Drag 'Order ID' (Count) to Angle. 4. Drag 'Order ID' (Count) & 'Cuisine' to Label. 5. Quick Table Calculation on Label -> Percent of Total.

Data_Fields_Used: Meal Type, Company Type, Order ID
Instruction_Details: 1. Drag 'Meal Type' to Columns. 2. Drag 'Company Type' to Columns (next to Meal Type). 3. Drag 'Order ID' (Count) to Rows. 4. Drag 'Company Type' to Color.
1. Drag 'Meal Type' to Columns. 2. Drag 'Customer Rating' to Rows. 3. Crucial: Go to Analysis menu and uncheck 'Aggregate Measures'. 4. Use 'Show Me' panel and select Box-and-Whisker Plot.
1. Drag 'City' to Columns. 2. Drag 'Order ID' (Count) to Rows. 3. Click the 'Sort Descending' icon on the toolbar. 4. Drag 'Order ID' (Count) to Label.
1. Drag 'Meal Type' to Columns. 2. Drag 'Total Revenue' (Sum) to Rows. 3. Change format on Revenue axis to Currency (Custom) -> No decimal places.

1. Right-click 'Time Taken for Delivery' -> Create -> Bins (set bin size to 5 mins). 2. Drag this new Bin field to Columns. 3. Drag 'Time Taken for Delivery' (Count) to Rows. 4. You will clearly see the 40-60 min spike.

1. Click 'New Dashboard' icon at the bottom. 2. Set 'Size' to Automatic. 3. Drag a 'Horizontal Container' to the top and place the KPI Text sheet here. 4. Drag charts 8 & 9 below to highlight Revenue & Delivery bottlenecks prominently. 5. Make all filters 'Apply to all using this data source'.
